html:
Rope is a Refined Item crafted with 3 Cut Grass. A Science Machine is required to unlock the recipe. Additionally, Rope can be found in Tumbleweeds.

Rope can be used to craft various Tools and Weapons. It can also be used to refuel a Fire Pit by 90 seconds or a Campfire by 45 seconds.

Contents

  • 1 Twine Twirler
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Twine Twirler

Walter with the "Twine Twirler" skill only needs 2 Cut Grass to craft Rope at twice the speed.

Trivia

  • In the old research system, the research cost of a Rope was 30.
  • In older versions of the game, rope used to fuel fires with as much energy as boards would (360/180 seconds). However, that was fixed to give the same amount as 3 cut grass.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

“Some short lengths of rope.”
–Wilson

–Willow

“A short length of strong hemp rope.”
–Wickerbottom
“Good for holding stuff to other stuff.”
–Woodie
“You'd think this would have more uses.”

“Refined grass braided into quite a durable cord.”
–Wagstaff
“Ströng enöugh tö bind the sails öf my löngship.”
–Wigfrid
“We could tie stuff up with this.”
–Webber
“Good for a lot of boring stuff.”
–Walani
“A bit too thick to tie up a roast.”
–Warly
“Fer lashin' stuff ta stuff.”
–Woodlegs
“IS'T BIG STRINGS”
–Wilba
“Friends made string”
–Wormwood
“I feel really confident about the strength of this braided grass.”
–Wheeler
“An essential building material.”
–Winona
“I hope it's not for binding imps.”
–Wortox
“For tying, florpt.”
–Wurt
“An essential part of any adventuring kit.”
–Walter
“I'm sure I'll find some use for it sooner or later.”
–Wanda

Rope can be used to craft various Tools and Weapons. It can also be used to refuel a Fire Pit by 90 seconds or a Campfire by 45 seconds.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dây Thừng là một Vật Phẩm Tinh Chế được chế tạo bằng 3 Cỏ Cắt. Cần có Máy Khoa học để mở khóa công thức. Ngoài ra, Dây Thừng có thể được tìm thấy ở Tumbleweeds.

'''Rope''' is a [[Refined]] [[Item]] crafted with 3 [[Cut Grass]]. A [[Science Machine]] is required to unlock the recipe. Additionally, Rope can be found in [[Tumbleweed]]s.

Rope can be used to craft various [[Tools]] and [[Weapons]]. It can also be used to [[Fire#Fuel|refuel]] a [[Fire Pit]] by 90 seconds or a [[Campfire]] by 45 seconds.
==={{PicDark|32|Twine Twirler}}Twine Twirler===
[[Walter]] with the "[[Walter/Don't Starve Together#Scouting|Twine Twirler]]" skill only needs 2 Cut Grass to craft Rope at twice the speed.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* In the old research system, the [[Research points list|research cost]] of a Rope was 30.
* In older versions of the game, rope used to fuel fires with as much energy as boards would (360/180 seconds). However, that was fixed to give the same amount as 3 cut grass.
